song.title: You Deserve
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] What is this love given to us That saved my life through selfless sacrifice Although we fail, the cross prevails Forgiveness stands, You take me back again
[P] You’ve shown me life, You’ve opened my eyes So I give You my praise, Yeah I give You my all You’ve shown me life, You’ve opened my eyes To the truth that there’s no greater love
[C] Now in the darkness, God’s light shines Christ forever glorified So come on, come on sing out to God Now with all we’ve got, we live for You, our God
[V2] Salvation’s strong in Christ alone The Saviour King alone in victory I step aside, give You my life For You to move, do what You want to do
[B] I can’t imagine life without You, without You ‘Cause it’s all for You Yeah it’s all for You, God
